title: The silence
subtitle: Two grids of ten thousand words each
caption: Each grid is 10,000 squares — ten thousand words of the profession's own proceedings. In any such stretch the word user lights about 47 squares (its 2000–08 rate); the word caste never lights even one, staying at or below 0.45 per 10,000 across all forty volumes, and falling to 0.23 in the most recent block. That near-silence, running straight through the rupture of 1991, is not a gap in the record. It is the record's deepest finding.
